task_updates.executor_notes: Refactored `createGenerationTask` to build `family`/`input` requests for `image_generation` and `travel_between_images`, added `reference_image_url`, `reference_mode`, `shot_id`, `model_name`, and `image_urls`, defaulted transfer requests to `qwen-image` when `reference_mode` is set, removed the old non-image_generation guard, and kept plain prompt+count compatibility by translating legacy calls into `prompts`/`imagesPerPrompt`.

Added `clips.ts` with clip->asset->generation resolution, shared-shot detection via `shot_generations`, and shot creation plus generation attachment through `insert_shot_at_position`. Extended `SupabaseAdmin` only for the chained select and insert patterns these helpers require. `clips.ts` remains under the requested ~80 line cap.

Added the `create_task` tool schema as the second `TIMELINE_AGENT_TOOLS` entry with the requested task type enum and `reference_image_urls` array, and removed `generate` from the `run` tool description.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `createGenerationTask` now posts `{ family, input, project_id, dependant_on, idempotency_key }`. Image-generation requests emit `prompts`/`imagesPerPrompt` plus `reference_mode`, `style_reference_image`, `subject_reference_image`, `shot_id`, and `model_name`; image-to-video requests emit `travel_between_images` input with `image_urls`, `base_prompts`, `segment_frames`, and `frame_overlap`.

`resolveClipGenerationIds` traverses `clip_id -> config.clips[].asset -> registry.assets[assetKey].generationId` and de-duplicates the result set. `findShotForGenerations` queries `shot_generations` by `generation_id`, intersects candidate `shot_id`s across all requested generations, and returns `null` when any generation is missing or no common shot exists.
`create_task` defines `reference_image_urls` as an array of strings, and the `run` tool description no longer lists `generate`.
